title: Clausal Discourse Structural Schema
description: Validates clausal-level particles, auxiliaries, copulas, and discourse expressions (PART, AUX, INTJ) modulating tense, aspect, mood, modality, polarity, or interactional stance.

pos_payload.description: The part-of-speech behavioral payload defining clausal and discourse token properties.

functional_scope.description: The specific semantic or clausal category modified by this token.

token_class.description: The general grammatical class corresponding to the token's core UPOS.

attachment_target.description: Linear placement constraint of the token relative to its clausal or lexical host expression.

ud_deprel_default.description: Default Universal Dependencies relation expected for this token.

surface_forms.description: All standard phonological/orthographic forms or clitic variations recognized for this item.

structural_constraints.description: Explicit parsing instructions, constraints on preceding/following boundary elements, or interaction rules.
